title: JanusEnvelope
description: Handoff schema from Chronos (evening trigger) to Aletheia (Möbius crystallisation pass)

session_ids.description: All session IDs active on this day

thought_count_by_bucket.description: Count of thought artifacts per T-bucket

archive_path.description: Path where the Day folder was archived (must contain W{WW})

trigger_type.description: What triggered the Möbius crystallisation pass

seed_md_path.description: Path to write SEED.md morning-context package

claude_mem_session_ids.description: Map of session_id → claude-mem session_id for night' promotion pass

child_session_map.description: Map of parent_session_id → [child_session_ids]. Used to batch subagent sessions with their parent in the Gnosis promotion pass.
